description: Export a SortingAnalyzer to Phy format for manual curation. Computes missing spike_amplitudes and principal_components extensions as needed, then writes a Phy template-gui directory under record_store.
rules: loads the analyzer from ANALYZER_DIR (a SortingAnalyzer folder)
writes the Phy export to record_store/phy_export/
captures the run log to record_store/export_phy_report.txt
degrades gracefully (still writes the report, exit 0) when spikeinterface is absent
usage: Set ANALYZER_DIR (a SortingAnalyzer folder, e.g. the analyzer/ produced by the metrics perk). Output: export_phy_report.txt + phy_export/.
limitation: Requires spikeinterface (spikeinterface.exporters). Writes only to record_store; the source analyzer is read-only.
